name: Liz and Tom's Crab Boil
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the boil ingredients (galangal leaf, bay leaves, celery, spring onions, jalapeno pepper, orange, lemon, garlic powder, onion powder, paprika, cayenne powder, black pepper, worcestershire sauce, nuoc mam, tabasco sauce, and parsley) in the bottom of your three-chambered boiler/steamer.
2. Bring to a steady boil.
3. Line the center basket with cubed potatoes and corn on the cob.
4. When the potatoes and corn are nearly done, put the crabs in the top chamber.
5. Continue cooking for an additional 5 minutes.
6. Remove crabs and vegetables and serve immediately.
